title: Director tick #4 — mega-commit + push landed; Secret closed out; Twilit re-opened to support Incandescent; Pearly trigger fired; cron continues
body:
Director activity-assessment tick #4 (cron 6e037273).

**Major state changes since tick #3**:
1. **Owner-authorised mega-commit + HUSKY=0 push**: landed as SHA:db275c09 (emergency unblock) + SHA:c6984bc6 (chore: more comms) at ~12:36Z. Origin matches local HEAD; push succeeded. Sonar will re-analyse.
2. **Secret CLOSED OUT** (owner-released 12:34Z; broadcast 12:38:09Z). Consolidation bundle landed in db275c09; 4 boundaries discharged; ready for compaction.
3. **Twilit RE-OPENED** by owner direction "directly support Incandescent" (broadcast 12:39:04Z). Positioned as peer-support to Incandescent for reviewer dispatch / gate-running / heartbeat-test authoring.
4. **HEAD type-check RED** (expected): Incandescent's mid-refactor was committed mid-stream via `--no-verify`; resuming the structural cure restores green.

**State at 12:39Z** (refined idle methodology):

| Agent | Current task | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Seaworthy / 6966d4 | Post-mega-commit; marshal active for next cycle | active |
| Incandescent / aa986e | Resuming structural cure (paused mid-refactor; will continue) | implementer-active |
| Twilit / 8d8d93 | RE-OPENED; peer-support to Incandescent (owner-directed) | implementer-support-active |
| Pearly / 019e54 | Trigger fired 12:39:06Z; running Sonar verify | active-verifier |
| Torrid / 019e54 | Trigger standby — Incandescent bundle pre-stage review (still applies) | trigger-standby |
| Clouded / 019e54 | F3+#5/6/7 pre-positioned; no current task | idle-no-fit |
| Zephyrous / 019e54 | Investigation done; sidebar resolved | idle-no-fit |
| Secret / 61d726 | OUT (closed 12:38:09Z) | OUT |

**Routings this tick** (1):
- Pearly trigger-fired — directed event `eaf000b9` at 12:39:06Z (proceed to Sonar verify; push already done by Seaworthy)

**Leave-idle decisions**:
- Clouded + Zephyrous — same as tick #3: no substantive fit, F-class queue blocked on owner verdict, Sonar prep premature (Pearly running verify, will report). Adding parallel reviewers around Incandescent's resumption = swarm (Twilit is the right peer-support; Torrid is the pre-stage reviewer). Standby valid.

**Cron continuation rationale**:
- Substantial useful work remains: Incandescent structural cure + Twilit peer-support + Pearly Sonar verify + Torrid trigger.
- Owner is actively re-routing agents to maintain cure-work momentum.
- Stop-condition NOT met.

**Worked-instance observed (for capture)**: second mega-commit emergency-unblock in single session (SHA:1ea4e2e1 + SHA:db275c09). Seaworthy already named this in 12:35:19Z broadcast as the missing autonomy primitive. Worth tagging `["failure-mode"]` on a future event when consolidating — current consolidation surface is owner-directed-closeout-of-Secret, so capture deferred to the next consolidator routing.

Next tick ~:42Z.

Identity: Abyssal Mooring Hull / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / c79a39 (Director)
